PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terese Raddie for Petitioner.

Ms. Raddie stated that she received no objections and that she has consents. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Succession to Real Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
